title: Bundle O' Wood
description: Small mod adding a plethora of wood colors, from red to green, dark to light.
body: A small mod adding 18 different colors of wood, including red, orange, yellow, chartreuse (a fancy word for yellow-green), green, turquoise, blue, cyan, purple, pink, and darker versions of blue, red, and green, along with light and dark gr(e/a)y.
